will be determined by the amount of VOT: will be determined by the amount of VOT3 you had at the time of the snapshot.
Craft your proposal by outlining the inf: Craft your proposal by outlining the information and functions to be executed.
In order for your proposal to be voted o: In order for your proposal to be voted on, it will have to have the support of the community.
If your proposal gets funded before the: If your proposal gets funded before the voting session starts, the community will vote to decide if they support or reject your idea.
If your proposal receives enough votes,: If your proposal receives enough votes, it will be executed.
These proposals involve specific changes: These proposals involve specific changes upon successful voting, aiming to implement concrete actions or modifications within the ecosystem.
If the desired outcome cannot be achieve: If the desired outcome cannot be achieved by calling smart contract functions, then please describe what change idea you would like to propose
Choose a title a short description for y: Choose a title a short description for your proposal. You will be able to provide more details in the next step.
Share the proposal on social media and i: Share the proposal on social media and invite people to vote
Are you completely sure to cancel this p: Are you completely sure to cancel this proposal? Community support will be returned, and you cannot recover this proposal.
This proposal has been cancelled by the: This proposal has been cancelled by the creator or VeBetter and can no longer be supported.
It was probably fraudulent or harmful to: It was probably fraudulent or harmful to the DAO.
Users who have made a comment along with: Users who have made a comment along with their vote
Create a proposal to get started: Create a proposal to get started
during which your proposal will be consi: during which your proposal will be considered for voting. Weekly rounds occur regularly on this platform
For a proposal to make it to a public vo: For a proposal to make it to a public vote, it must achieve community support. You can collaborate with this proposal by temporarily contributing some VOT3 tokens.
How is the voting power calculated?: How is the voting power calculated?
If you cancel the proposal it will not b: If you cancel the proposal it will not be voted on in the next round. After the round starts, you will no longer be able to cancel it.
Incoming proposals are proposals that ar: Incoming proposals are proposals that are not yet active
Past proposals are proposals that have b: Past proposals are proposals that have been completed
Please select at least one function: Please select at least one function
Proposals are based on smart contracts t: Proposals are based on smart contracts that will be executed. Select the action that you proposal will trigger if succeed in the voting session.
Proposals represent your ideas as a valu: Proposals represent your ideas as a valued member of the DAO community, aimed at enhancing or modifying aspects of the ecosystem. Each proposal undergoes a voting process, and upon approval, is brought to life.
Providing more information will help the: Providing more information will help the community understand the purpose of your proposal and make informed voting decisions. Include details such as motivation, a detailed description, or any other relevant information.
Show your support to this proposal by co: Show your support to this proposal by contributing with your VOT3 tokens, allowing it to be up for voting on Round {{round}}
The community has not supported this pro: The community has not supported this proposal and was canceled
This proposal must get the support of th: This proposal must get the support of the community before the round starts
This proposal needs to get enough suppor: This proposal needs to get enough support for the community to be voted on Round {{round}}.
This proposal will be voted in: This proposal will be voted in
This round is ended, claim your tokens b: This round is ended, claim your tokens back.
This proposal won’t reach enough support: This proposal won’t reach enough support and it was canceled.
To aim for the equality and quality of t: To aim for the equality and quality of the voting process, we use quadratic voting coso, which divide your total amount of VOT3 for the square root.
Waiting for the round to start: Waiting for the round to start
You will be able to claim your tokens ba: You will be able to claim your tokens back when the voting round ends.
You will be able to get those tokens bac: You will be able to get those tokens back when the round is over.
